mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET review_title = #{req.reviewTitle}, review_content = #{req.reviewContent}, secret = #{req.secret}, temporary = #{req.temporary}, custom_thumbnail = #{req.customThumbnail}, created_at = CASE WHEN temporary = TRUE AND #{req.temporary} = FALSE THEN NOW() ELSE created_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id AND l.user_id = #{userId})) AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId} AND r.status = TRUE AND (r.secret = FALSE OR r.user_id = #{userId})

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content AS content, c.user_id AS userId, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.parent_id AS parentId FROM review_comments c JOIN reviews r ON c.review_id = r.review_id WHERE c.review_id = #{reviewId} AND r.status = TRUE ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail FROM reviews r WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id = #{id} AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE AND r.status = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET status = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, review_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, true AS liked FROM reviews r INNER JOIN likes l ON r.review_id = l.review_id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = TRUE AND temporary = FALSE

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r INNER JOIN follows f ON r.user_id = f.followed LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE f.follower = #{userId} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, COUNT(l.user_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN likes l ON r.review_id = l.review_id AND l.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY r.review_id, r.ISBN, r.review_title, r.review_content, r.secret, r.status, r.temporary, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.user_id, r.category, u.nickname, u.profile_image ORDER BY likeCount DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.ISBN = #{isbn} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.category = #{category} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, false AS liked FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{currentUserId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM reviews r INNER JOIN likes l ON r.review_id = l.review_id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE l.user_id = #{targetUserId} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE ISBN = #{isbn} AND temporary = 0
SELECT user_id as userId, COUNT(*) as reviewCount FROM reviews WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND temporary = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY reviewCount DESC
SELECT review_title AS reviewTitle FROM reviews WHERE review_id=#{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, r.custom_thumbnail AS customThumbnail, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.profile_image AS authorProfileImage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments c WHERE c.review_id = r.review_id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.review_id = r.review_id AND l2.user_id = #{currentUserId}) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked, rc.comment_id AS myCommentId, rc.content AS myCommentContent, rc.created_at AS myCommentCreatedAt, rc.updated_at AS myCommentUpdatedAt FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN review_comments rc ON r.review_id = rc.review_id WHERE rc.user_id = #{targetUserId} AND r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND r.secret = FALSE ORDER BY rc.created_at DESC
SELECT user_id FROM reviews WHERE temporary = 0 AND DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
